message:
chore(beads): update tracker for FCP3 migration phases and dependency graph

Update issue statuses and add new issues tracking the FCP3 mesh-first
migration planning deliverables:
- Add/update P1.1-P1.5 phase issues (semantic inventory, owner map,
  guardrails, acceptance contracts, scorecard)
- Update dependency graph linking the P1 phase chain
- Close completed planning issues
